title: How can I switch to an individual plan after my trial has expired?
excerpt:
Hi everyone 
My trial finished a few days ago and I’ve yet to see how Monday.com complements my workflows. Its only me in my business as I’m a freelancer, hence I’m keen to continue experimenting with the free Individual…

posts.author: GMAD (Simon P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone

My trial finished a few days ago and I’ve yet to see how Monday.com complements my workflows. Its only me in my business as I’m a freelancer, hence I’m keen to continue experimenting with the free Individual Plan before committing to an upgrade.

However, I can’t find an option to do this. My access is frozen in read-only mode and there is no way to choose anything other than a paid plan. I contacted Support days ago but have heard nothing.

Someone had a similar issue here Trial ended and it won't let me in to the individual platform.

Can anyone here help?

TIA
GMAD

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GMAD!

Are you able to pop us over an email at support@monday.com, with the URL for your account?
We’d be happy to take a further look into this and move you over to the individual plan on our side

Best,
Dani
